query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry, centroid and bounding box

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk-class values inside Trondheim bbox

3.description: select quick-clay polygons for Trondheim with the high risk-class value

4.description: select buildings in Trondheim with their representation point

5.description: find buildings that intersect the high-risk quick-clay polygons

6.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

7.description: reduce to one row per building using MIN(distance)

8.description: sort buildings by ascending distance to centroid
